| **[An Unconditional Barrier for Proving Multilinear Algebraic Branching Program Lower Bounds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00746v2)** | 2026-05-11 | <details><summary>An an...</summary><p>An anonymous referee pointed out a gap in the proof of Lemma 4.1: the bound on the forced probability holds unconditionally but not conditionally on the filtration $F_t$, which is what the supermartingale argument requires. All the results in the paper crucially rely on the correctness of this lemma.</p></details> |
